name: alpha_001_qrev_mix
expr: add(rank(subtract(divide(cashflow_op, assets), divide(debt, assets))), rank(ts_delta(close, 5))), multiply(-1, rank(ts_mean(ts_delta(close, 1), 5))))

name: alpha_002_margin_revert
expr: add(rank(divide(ebit, assets)), add(rank(divide(cashflow_op, debt)), multiply(-1, rank(ts_mean(ts_delta(close, 1), 10)))))

name: alpha_003_analyst_quality_rev
expr: add(rank(subtract(divide(cashflow_op, assets), divide(capex, assets))), add(rank(subtract(est_eps, eps)), multiply(-1, rank(ts_delta(close, 20)))))

name: alpha_004_profit_stability_rev
expr: add(rank(ts_zscore(divide(ebitda, assets), 252)), add(rank(ts_zscore(divide(cashflow_op, assets), 252)), multiply(-1, rank(ts_mean(ts_delta(close, 1), 3)))))

name: alpha_005_balance_reversal
expr: add(rank(subtract(divide(cash, assets), divide(debt, assets))), add(rank(divide(bookvalue_ps, close)), multiply(-1, rank(ts_mean(ts_delta(close, 1), 7)))))

name: alpha_006_fundamental_momrev
expr: add(rank(subtract(divide(est_cashflow_op, assets), divide(debt_st, assets))), add(rank(subtract(est_sales, sales)), multiply(-1, rank(ts_delta(close, 10)))))
